---
name: Translation Request
about: Submit a new language translation or improve an existing one
title: "[TRANSLATION] "
labels: translation
assignees: ''

---

## Language
- **Language Name**: (e.g., Urdu, Arabic, Malay)
- **BCP-47 Code**: (e.g., `ur`, `ar`, `ms`)
- **Is this a new language or an improvement to an existing one?**: New / Existing

## Translation Status
- [ ] I have reviewed the complete English translation (`translations/en.js`)
- [ ] I have translated all UI strings accurately
- [ ] I have tested the translation in the application (if possible)
- [ ] I understand RTL vs LTR text direction requirements

## Additional Context
- Are you a native speaker of this language?
- Have you consulted with other native speakers to verify accuracy?
- Are there any cultural or Islamic context-specific terms that needed special attention?

## Notes for Maintainers
- Provide any links to translation guides or glossaries you used
- Mention if this is a regional variant (e.g., Egyptian Arabic vs Modern Standard Arabic)
- Include any notes on financial or Islamic terminology that may require careful translation

## Acknowledgment
- [ ] I have ensured all string keys match the English version exactly
- [ ] I am submitting this translation as a pull request or in the body of this issue
- [ ] I give permission for this translation to be licensed under the same license as the Zakah Calculator
